name: cogent42-plus-soul
description: Fork of cogent42 (https://github.com/cogent42/cogent42) — Telegram bot that gives you full Claude Code access to your server, with the added SOUL.md persona harness for durable persona/tone injection.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags
